FIGHTER.desc: Pure melee combatant with the best THAC0, HP, and weapon proficiency options. Can achieve Grand Mastery (5 pips).

RANGER.desc: Wilderness warrior with stealth, dual-wielding, and limited druid spellcasting at higher levels. Racial enemy bonus.

PALADIN.desc: Holy warrior with Lay on Hands, Turn Undead, Protection from Evil aura, and limited priest spellcasting. Must be Lawful Good.

CLERIC.desc: Divine spellcaster with full priest spell progression, Turn Undead, and decent combat ability. Blunt weapons only.

DRUID.desc: Nature priest with unique spell list, shapeshifting at high levels, and elemental resistances. Must be True Neutral.

THIEF.desc: Skill-based class with Pick Locks, Find Traps, Pick Pockets, Move Silently, Hide in Shadows, Detect Illusion, Set Traps, and backstab.

BARD.desc: Jack-of-all-trades with Bard Song, limited arcane spellcasting, Pick Pockets, and lore identification.

MAGE.desc: Primary arcane spellcaster with full wizard spell progression. Can learn spells from scrolls and scribe them to spellbook.

SORCERER.desc: Innate arcane caster who knows spells permanently without a spellbook. More casts per day but fewer spells known.

MONK.desc: Unarmed martial artist with increasing speed, AC, magic resistance, and special abilities. Cannot wear armor.

SHAMAN.desc: Spirit dancer who casts unique shaman spells and summons spirit allies through the Shamanic Dance ability.

BARBARIAN.desc: Savage warrior with Rage, increased movement speed, damage resistance, and high HP. Cannot wear full plate.
